candidate_updates.title: Building permit submittal documents

candidate_update.requirement_text: Applicant must provide permit application materials and supporting construction documents sufficient for PP&D staff review before permit approval.
candidate_update.applicability: Building permit workflows where plan review or construction document review is required.
candidate_update.evidence_summary: Fixture extraction identifies submittal materials as a required document class and traceability links the statement to source excerpts.

candidate_updates.rollback_note: Delete this candidate packet entry only; no active requirement nodes are modified.

candidate_updates.title: Permit application fee trigger

candidate_update.requirement_text: Permit fees may be triggered when an application is accepted for intake, review, issuance, inspection, or related PP&D service activity.
candidate_update.applicability: Permit workflows with fee schedules or service charges.
candidate_update.evidence_summary: Fixture traceability identifies fee-trigger language tied to intake and service events.

candidate_updates.rollback_note: Remove candidate req-form-fee-001; no fee schedule or active logic is changed.

candidate_updates.title: Correction response deadline candidate

candidate_update.requirement_text: When PP&D requests corrections or additional information, the applicant may need to respond within the deadline stated in the applicable notice, code provision, or program rule.
candidate_update.applicability: Applications with correction cycles or additional-information requests.
candidate_update.evidence_summary: Fixture extraction contains deadline language but does not establish a universal fixed number of days.

candidate_updates.rollback_note: Remove candidate req-form-deadline-001; no deadline calculator or active requirement changes are introduced.

candidate_updates.title: Digital plan file standards candidate

candidate_update.requirement_text: Digital plan files should comply with the file format, naming, organization, and upload constraints stated by PP&D for the applicable permit workflow.
candidate_update.applicability: Online or electronic permit submittals that require plan or document upload.
candidate_update.evidence_summary: Fixture traceability links file-rule extraction to source material describing electronic document constraints.

candidate_updates.rollback_note: Delete this candidate entry; it does not alter upload automation, public corpus files, or active file validation.

candidate_updates.title: Minor work permit-type exception candidate

candidate_update.requirement_text: Certain minor work or permit types may follow a reduced, different, or exempt review path when an applicable PP&D source expressly provides that exception.
candidate_update.applicability: Permit classifications with source-cited exceptions from standard review requirements.
candidate_update.evidence_summary: Fixture extraction includes exception language, but scope must be confirmed by a human reviewer before activation.

candidate_updates.rollback_note: Remove candidate req-form-exception-001; no active permit classification or exception logic is changed.

candidate_updates.title: Approval before regulated work gate candidate

candidate_update.requirement_text: Regulated work must not proceed until the required permit, approval, or authorization gate has been satisfied for the applicable workflow.
candidate_update.applicability: Workflows where PP&D approval is a prerequisite to construction, alteration, occupancy, or related regulated activity.
candidate_update.evidence_summary: Fixture traceability maps action-gate language to source excerpts describing authorization before proceeding.

candidate_updates.rollback_note: Delete candidate req-form-gate-001; no active guardrail bundle or workflow gate is modified.
